summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Financial News V3 features. Backend APIs working excellently (97% success). Admin dashboard, TipTap editor, scheduling, user management, and XML sitemap all functional. Article page rendering issue identified.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 422 instead of 400 for missing file (actually correct behavior)
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - validation working correctly

critical_bugs.issue: Article content not rendering - pages show header/ticker but main content area is black/empty
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot read articles - core functionality broken

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test OG meta tags due to article page rendering issue
Cannot test author profiles due to article page issue

passed_tests: Dashboard stats showing V3 features (Scheduled: 0, Team: 1)
TipTap WYSIWYG editor with full toolbar (Bold, Italic, Headings, Lists, Images, YouTube, Tables)
Secondary categories selection (5 buttons: crypto, sponsored, educational, markets, defi)
User management (Team page) with create user form and role selection
Admin profile with social fields (name, bio, twitter, linkedin, website)
XML sitemap with proper structure and multiple URL categories
Homepage loading with ticker strip and navigation
Homepage sections (Latest, Crypto, Press Releases, Sponsored)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix article page rendering issue. Article content is not displaying on public article pages (e.g., /crypto/bitcoin-surges-past-100k-institutional-demand). This prevents users from reading articles and testing OG meta tags/author profiles. Check routing, component rendering, and API integration for article pages.
